textByHash.177412d193508fa6f7f39b6e4bfe30122069e401: Well look who it is! The hero of Prifddinas!
textByHash.21cf836cfd1a1f6396ab723a9012779893b76882: But I can see I will not change your mind. That's fine, I don't need to.
textByHash.4c05dc6bb167b5db349c7bb95539b92e83c00fd2: We served Lord Iorwerth because he was our leader. We may not have agreed with all that he did, but that didn't matter. He was in charge and we were not.
textByHash.4ef83728792678b884ed0a29b026d078c3c2286a: I was born into the Iorwerth clan, Lord Iorwerth was my uncle. Do you think I had a say in what my life would be? Do you think any of us did?
textByHash.7be4b6e1b3091b3f7bfad7b3c3cf1885bd172764: Had I been born into the Cadarn clan, I'd be considered a hero right now. But I wasn't, so instead I am the villain.
textByHash.8015731ea10288ce8daed3314e5db53b5eda3080: He did. Iestin was brave, I respect that. His bravery has rewarded him with leadership over our clan. But bravery comes easy when you have nothing left to lose.
textByHash.86eab98adb88b688cf7b9aa3f924fb703babecda: What should we do with them, my lord.
textByHash.c44940a3cf4f4f50e83b19d919a0b2821cb0f4d8: That said, you'd do well to remember that the actions of Lord Iorwerth should not be used to judge our entire clan.
textByHash.c4f3d528904c1f509fbf0bcf5f1c25004551fba1: You seem upset by that. I served Lord Iorwerth because I didn't have a choice. The other elves realised that, hence the pardon.
textByHash.cb5b8b1b6483c6d5445d6925e15322d835b418ab: That's likely due to the fact that I am being sarcastic.
textByHash.ed1e01bf38aafd8e62ded717687397da25e33ba0: Yes, but you're a mercenary. You're lucky enough to be able to side with the highest bidder. Not all of us are so privileged.
textByHash.f3e005112beafe32117a8e0414423d264a305c65: Are you the human by the name of ?
